frictions.description: Supabase email rate limit exceeded prevented creating test accounts. All signup attempts (5+ different emails) returned 'email rate limit exceeded' error.
frictions.resolution: Unable to resolve - rate limit is server-side. Attempted: unique UUID-based emails, timestamp-based emails, different email domains.

blockers.description: Supabase Auth API rate limit exceeded - cannot create new test users via signup endpoint. Rate limit appears to be IP-based or project-wide.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted 5+ different email patterns with unique UUIDs and timestamps, all returned 'email rate limit exceeded'. Direct API calls also rate limited.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-AUTH-007, VAL-LAYOUT-003), 3 blocked (VAL-AUTH-004, VAL-AUTH-005, VAL-LAYOUT-001). Blocked assertions require authenticated user session which could not be established due to Supabase email rate limiting. The sign-in error display (VAL-AUTH-007) and auth callback routing (VAL-LAYOUT-003) both function correctly.
